content.text:
The fix is complete. Here's a summary:

**Bug:** `MudBreadcrumbs` renders a `<nav>` element without an `aria-label`, which goes against W3C accessibility recommendations that breadcrumb navigation should have `aria-label="Breadcrumb"`.

**Fix:** Added `aria-label="Breadcrumb"` to the `<nav>` element in `src/MudBlazor/Components/Breadcrumbs/MudBreadcrumbs.razor` (line 11).

**Verification:** All existing breadcrumb tests continue to pass (all 4 passed).

**Fix:** Added `aria-label="Breadcrumb"` to the `<nav>` element in `src/MudBlazor/Components/Breadcrumbs/MudBreadcrumbs.razor` (line 11).

**Verification:** All existing breadcrumb tests continue to pass (all 4 passed).
